_patch_meta.description: M15 Phase 2 UT verse review. All 313 UT verses individually read and classified. Set-asides: sexual uses of ya.da, financial calculation uses of cha.shav, physical tasting ta.am, non-musing si.ach, musical hig.ga.von, social-recognition agnoeō/ya.da, communicative-only logos. Confirmed: all remaining UT verses. Borderlines resolved by researcher decision 2026-05-08.
_patch_meta.supersedes: PATCH-20260508-M15-VCREVISE-UTREVIEW-V1 (format errors: operation='upsert' not supported by applicator; field 'context_description' not on verse_context table — moved to 'analysis_note'; terms_covered list out of sync with operations)
_patch_meta.correction_note: Canonical-format rewrite. 323 insert ops (UT cases) + 3 update ops (existing rows). context_description -> analysis_note. terms_covered + input_versions recomputed from actual operations. R4 integrity: 2 provisional anchor(s) set on terms with no pre-existing anchor (6668, 5278); Phase 6 mapping revisits these. Verified against DB as of generation time.
